CE settings page omits Teams from both Providers and Communication while still rendering Microsoft profiles and Inbound Email.
EE settings page with `teams-integration-ui` enabled renders Teams only in Communication and not in Providers.
EE settings page with `teams-integration-ui` disabled omits active Teams UI without breaking the rest of the Communication tab.
CE Teams tab route returns the documented unavailable behavior without executing Teams business logic.
EE Teams tab route with flag off returns the documented disabled behavior without executing Teams business logic.
EE Teams tab route with flag on delegates into the EE implementation.
CE Teams bot route returns the documented unavailable behavior without executing Teams business logic.
EE Teams bot route with flag on delegates into the EE implementation.
CE Teams message-extension routes return unavailable responses without executing Teams business logic.
EE Teams message-extension routes with flag on delegate into the EE implementation.
CE Teams auth callback routes return unavailable responses without starting Teams auth completion.
EE Teams auth callback routes with flag on delegate into the EE implementation.
CE Teams package/install routes return unavailable responses without touching Teams package state.
EE Teams package/install routes with flag on delegate into the EE implementation.
CE action wrappers return EE-unavailable results for Teams settings, package, and quick-action submissions.
EE flag-off action wrappers return disabled results for Teams settings, package, and quick-action submissions.
Teams action modules continue to satisfy Next.js `use server` export constraints after helper extraction.
CE notification broadcasts never attempt Teams delivery after the extraction.
EE flag-off notification broadcasts never attempt Teams delivery after the extraction.
EE flag-on notification broadcasts can reach EE Teams delivery through enterprise-owned code.
Fresh CE schema validation confirms Teams tables are absent while Microsoft profile tables remain present.
Fresh EE schema validation confirms Teams tables are present alongside shared Microsoft profile tables.
Shared Microsoft profile CRUD remains available in CE after the Teams extraction.
Shared Microsoft profile CRUD remains available in EE after the Teams extraction.
EE flag-on tenants can still access the Teams v1 surface set after the extraction without new product scope.
The migration validator and scratchpad runbooks cover settings, routes, actions, and schema verification commands.
